title: It's all doors
description: This mod adds 42 new doors and 22 trapdoors from different blocks! It can be useful for decorating your buildings.
body:
This mod adds **42** new doors and **22** trapdoors from different blocks! It can be useful for decorating your buildings.


All doors and trapdoors are unique and can be crafted and obtained in survival. They not only look different, but also have different properties.
